name: Your Third
original_name: ที่สามของเธอ
overview: Sam flees to a southern island after his brother steals the love he secretly cherished for years. Just as he's healing, his meddling brother sends someone to drag him back. Jam, a sharp-witted assistant, is tasked with finding and retrieving the runaway. Tracking Sam is one thing—convincing him to return is another!

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT | ที่สามของเธอ | Your Third Series
